question_text:
Today, Elizabeth went to the library. Between what times could they have gone?
We know that: 
Elizabeth woke up at 7am.
Hannah saw Elizabeth driving to the water park from 7am to 9am.
Leslie saw Elizabeth waiting at the airport from 9am to 4pm.
Samantha saw Elizabeth buying a bike at the bike shop from 4pm to 6pm.
The library was closed after 7pm.
Between what times could Elizabeth have gone to the library?

A. 6pm to 7pm
B. 4pm to 6pm
C. 7am to 9am
D. 9am to 4pm
